overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City's neon-lit downtown. The character navigates from a narrow alley down stairs, crosses wet streets reflecting holographic advertisements, and walks past towering skyscrapers covered in digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with stairway descent to lower plaza

events.description: begins descending the concrete stairs to the lower urban level
reaches the bottom of the stairs entering the lower open plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow alley between concrete walls and descending a flight of stairs toward a lower plaza

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead descending the stairs in the same direction

entered.detail: tall illuminated advertisement showing a figure with text reading BE YOUR BEST SELF
tall gray concrete wall with graffiti and weathered texture
concrete stairs descending to a lower urban level with metal railings

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow enclosed alleyway at night, flanked by a large glowing digital billboard on the left and a concrete wall on the right. The character walks forward and descends a flight of stairs toward a lower plaza level where a few pedestrians are visible. The environment is dimly lit with artificial light sources from the billboard and distant neon signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: begins ascending the stairs on the far side of the lower plaza
emerges from under the elevated highway overpass into the open street intersection

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs and walking under an elevated roadway structure toward the street level

entered.detail: large concrete highway structure with orange trim spanning overhead
thick cylindrical pillars supporting the elevated highway
open area where the covered walkway meets the main city street with visible crosswalks

segments.scene_description: The character ascends stairs from the lower plaza and moves through a semi-covered area beneath an elevated highway overpass. Concrete support pillars line the left side as the walkway opens up to reveal a street intersection ahead. The lighting shifts from dim artificial to mixed natural and neon as the character approaches the open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane intersection with wet reflective asphalt and elevated highway ramps

events.description: begins crossing the wet multi-lane street at the intersection
red sports car drives past on the wet road creating reflections

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide wet street while navigating around moving vehicles and heading toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: dark wet road surface reflecting the neon lights from surrounding buildings
tall futuristic buildings covered in glowing holographic advertisements and digital billboards
curved orange-trimmed highway ramp connecting to the main overpass

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into a wide open intersection with wet asphalt reflecting the vibrant neon lights of towering skyscrapers. The camera crosses the multi-lane street, passing a red sports car, while surrounded by massive digital billboards and holographic advertisements covering the futuristic buildings. The elevated highway ramp curves away to the left as the character approaches the far sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with storefronts and digital signage

events.description: passes under intense pink and red neon signage illuminating the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various commercial storefronts and bright neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: ground-level shops with metal shutters and glowing neon trim in pink and cyan
tall digital sign displaying PURE OVERKILL with a map graphic
metal barrier separating the sidewalk from the adjacent street

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete sidewalk, the character passes commercial storefronts with closed shutters illuminated by intense pink and cyan neon lights. A digital advertising kiosk stands on the left side of the path while pedestrians walk in the opposite direction. The street railing runs along the left edge separating the walkway from the road where sparse traffic continues to move.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with crosswalk and overhead pedestrian bridge

events.description: approaches and begins crossing the final intersection at the crosswalk
enters the center of the intersection surrounded by towering neon buildings on all sides

agents.ego_description: approaching and crossing the final street intersection with bright neon signs and holographic displays overhead

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet asphalt
metal walkway structure spanning across the intersection above street level
curved high-rise building with vertical neon lighting and multiple balconies

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character approaching and crossing a busy intersection marked with yellow crosswalk stripes. The wet pavement reflects the intense neon glow from surrounding skyscrapers, including a distinctive curved residential tower on the left. An overhead pedestrian bridge spans the intersection ahead as the character moves through the center of the wide open crossing, surrounded by towering buildings covered in digital advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, dimly lit alleyway into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic city intersection. It begins by descending stairs from a narrow alley flanked by a glowing billboard, moving through a lower plaza before ascending again into the concrete shadows beneath an elevated highway overpass. As the camera emerges from under the overpass, the environment opens into a wide intersection where wet asphalt reflects the vibrant holographic advertisements of towering skyscrapers and a passing red sports car. The path then shifts along a concrete sidewalk past shuttered storefronts bathed in intense pink and cyan light, moving alongside a digital kiosk and a street railing. Finally, the scene expands as the character crosses a busy intersection marked by yellow stripes, moving beneath a pedestrian bridge while surrounded by massive digital billboards and a curved residential tower.
